message:
Implement BeadScanner for swarm bead counting (bd-2xinm, bd-1bz6d)

Add BeadScanner component in internal/swarm/bead_scanner.go that:
- Discovers projects in a directory (with .git or .beads)
- Counts open beads via `br list --status open --json`
- Supports concurrent scanning with configurable parallelism
- Handles missing br binary and empty projects gracefully
- Includes comprehensive test coverage

Update CLI swarm.go to use BeadScanner instead of placeholder
countProjectBeads function that returned hardcoded values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
